---
title: ""
---

::: {.homepage}
::: {.profile-column}
![](files/profile_pic.png){.profile-image}

# Stan H. {.profile-name}

::: {.profile-links}
<a href="mailto:q6he@ucsd.edu" aria-label="Email"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i></a>
<a href="https://github.com/rsm-q6he" aria-label="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/stanqhe" aria-label="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
:::
:::

::: {.content-column}
## About

I am a Master of Science in Business Analytics student at UC San Diego. 

This site collects coursework, and notes in MGTA495 Marketing Analytics.
:::
:::
